Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

IMHO we need to cache MDT-object's EA, because filesystem default stripe is based on this. Furthermore, this cache is not for LFSCK only, which can be used by normal operations.

parents.subject: LU-6245 libcfs: remove wrappers for timer functions

commit.subject: LU-8840 osp: handle EA cache properly
commit.message:
LU-8840 osp: handle EA cache properly

For success case, dt_xattr_get() should return the EA size
instead of zero. If such EA does not exist, return -ENODATA.

More code cleanup for OSP EA cache to avoid potential reference
leak, buffer overflow, and so on.

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
